steps.title: Use the meaning of $(0,b)$
steps.content: If the graph passes through $(0,b)$, then $b$ is the function value when $x=0$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Therefore $b=23$. The answer is 23. This is the $y$-intercept of the graph because the point has $x=0$. All terms with $x$ disappear at that input.
